_comment: Model pairs that share data across different @unique keys but are RECONCILED by one documented resolver. The check-data-source-ssot gate fails only on pairs NOT listed here. Add a pair ONLY after every reader routes through the single resolver named below.

pairs.note: Org config authoritative; user config legacy fallback. Margot + all estimators read via the resolver; the dashboard editor mirror-writes both. RA-7026 #1892.
